name: FIFA World Cup 2026 Official Squad Lists
licenseNote: Official FIFA document. The source PDF is cached outside version control; only factual squad data and provenance are redistributed. No photographs, layout, prose, or branding are copied.
snapshotNote: The 2 June announcement identifies these as the submitted final lists. FIFA serves the linked PDF dynamically; the retrieved artifact labels itself Version 1 and is checksum-pinned here.
